description.value: Movement is life, stillness is death. You've learned to read the rhythm of incoming attacks and flow around them rather than absorb them — turning the moment an enemy misses into the moment they regret it.

system.benefits: As 1 [Combat] action, enter defensive meditation until start of your next turn: attacks against you add 1 to both attack dice. When an attack misses you while in Flowing Guard, you can spend 1 Luck to make an immediate unarmed strike as a [Reaction]
